{{Infobox concept
| name = Icon
| introduced = Wintersteel
}}

''See also: [[Icon Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|An Icon is a symbol representing a significant concept of reality and serves as a connection to a greater power. They are essential for those seeking to become [[Sages]], as the process of manifestation requires an individual to embody a specific concept. To achieve this, a person must deeply understand their [[madra]] and undergo years of intense willpower training to refine their focus and concentration. The specific Icon a person manifests is determined by the nature of their [[madra]] and core concepts that have defined their identity since childhood. While an individual can manifest multiple [[Icons]], having more does not necessarily increase power; rather, it provides greater versatility. A [[Sage]]'s unique abilities are often derived from their specific relationship with their Icon. Examples of [[Icons]] include [[the Sword]], Winter, [[Strength]], Void, [[Death]], Joy, Life, and Hammer [[Icons]], among many others.}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|An Icon is a symbol representing a greater concept of reality that appears in the sky during an individual's ascension to [[Sage]]. During her own journey, [[Yerin]] has touched the [[Sword Icon]], while the [[Winter Sage]] successfully manifested the [[Winter Icon]]. The process of manifesting such a symbol requires intense critical focus and a deep, sensory understanding of one's own [[madra]]. Ultimately, the specific Icon that appears is determined by both the nature of a person's [[madra]] and a core concept of their identity.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">8</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|An [[Icon]] appears in the sky during ascension to [[Sage]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c3">''Wintersteel'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|An [[Icon]] is a symbol of a greater concept of reality.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c8">''Wintersteel'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] has touched the [[Sword Icon]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Winter Sage]] manifested the [[Winter Icon]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Manifesting an [[Icon]] requires critical focus.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] needs to try to touch the [[Icon]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c23">''Wintersteel'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Manifesting an [[Icon]] requires understanding the significance of one's [[madra]] and sensing it deeply.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c28">''Wintersteel'', chapter 28</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The specific [[Icon]] manifested depends on the nature of one's [[madra]] and a core concept of their identity.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c28" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Bloodline ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|A [[Sage]]'s abilities can be tied to their unique relationship with an [[Icon]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c9">''Bloodline'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|Holding the mummified hand exposed long enough might manifest an [[Icon]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c14">''Bloodline'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Reaper ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] summoned an [[Icon]] when he was an [[Underlord]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c5">''Reaper'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] is connected to the endlessly hungry [[Icon]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c25">''Reaper'', chapter 25</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Waybound ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Touching an [[Icon]] requires gathering wisdom and insight.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c3">''Waybound'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yerin]] hears a sound that is not like the distant sensation of an [[Icon]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c12">''Waybound'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
